body_template: The last village before the climb. The great pass at Warmiwañusca rises {miles_to_next} ahead.
The highest ground of the trail is behind {character}. Pacaymayo lies {miles_to_next} down the far side.
A camp beside the stream below the pass. Chaquicocha waits {miles_to_next} on.
Into the cloud forest, the ridges wrapped in mist. Wiñay Wayna lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
Terraces spill down the green canyon wall. The Sun Gate stands {miles_to_next} beyond.
{character} steps through the Sun Gate and the citadel comes into view. Just {miles_remaining} remain.
{character} arrives at the stone citadel above the clouds — {total_miles} walked from Km 82.
